stemHtml: A Hot Rod Ice Detection System indicates aircraft ice accretion by…

options.a: the ice build-up on the probe, which is visible via a cockpit instrument.
options.b: the activation of an ice-warning light in the cockpit.
options.c: the ice build-up on the probe, which can be viewed from the cockpit.
options.d: the automatic activation of the aircraft de-icing system.
